channel.title: Rev. Mater. Res.
channel.description: Filtered papers from Rev. Mater. Res.

item.title: Material-Conditioned Neural Network for 3D Inverse Design of Terahertz Cross-Polarization Metasurfaces
item.description:
Publication date: Available online 20 July 2026

Source: Review of Materials Research

Author(s): Qinkai Li, Hongshun Liu, Xingyu Wang, Xuehong Sun, Liping Liu, Caiyan Jiang
